name: Albumin-replacement plasma exchange
summary: Albumin-replacement plasma exchange is normalized for AMBAR-style therapeutic plasma exchange evidence in Alzheimer disease functional outcomes.
mechanism_summary: Uses plasma exchange with albumin replacement to alter circulating factors, with evidence bounded to disease-specific Alzheimer clinical endpoints.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: AMBAR plasma exchange Alzheimer disease trial; AMBAR plasma exchange slowed Alzheimer functional decline.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
